questions: What machinery must change for tiered gate depth, and what precedents exist?
What may a short chain skip, under what guards?

findings.claim: Substitutable priors (Phase 59), audited gate-skips (Phase 75), and a hardcoded REQUIRED_PHASES tuple are the three seams tiering composes
Declaration = required_gate_artifacts in plan.json (Shape 3); guard = existing risk routing + change_class; an external mutation-classification doctrine M-classes adopted as rationale only
findings.citation: qor/capabilities/risk.py:55-79; a sibling governance repository/an external mutation-classification doctrine.md:269-335

findings.claim: Shape 3 selected; audit-skip only for L1 + non-release with severity-1 shadow event; substantiate gates unchanged; L2/L3 paths force full chain
findings.citation: operator decision 2026-07-04 (AskUserQuestion; recorded in brief section Governor Decisions)

findings.claim: Phase 168 itself touches gate machinery (L3 path) and must be classified full-chain by its own guard
